steps.title: Match pronoun to antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun in the second clause refers back to "These minuscule animals," meaning tardigrades. Because the antecedent is plural, the blank needs a plural subject pronoun.

steps.title: Reject singular pronouns
steps.content: A, B, and D are singular or otherwise do not agree with the plural antecedent "animals." The pronoun must refer to the group of tardigrades. The answer is C.
